keyPoints: Causal effects of AI-enabled scaffolds (SMMs, role rotation, AI moderation) on relationship quality, trust, and joint problem solving over 12 months.
Adopt a rigorous multi-arm longitudinal design with randomization or quasi-experiments.
Operationalize and harmonize SMMs, trust, relationship quality, and joint problem-solving metrics with validated AI-context instruments.
Account for team composition (dyad vs triad) and cross-disciplinary heterogeneity as potential moderators.
Test mediation pathways from scaffolds to SMM alignment to trust and joint problem solving.
Plan for measurement timing: baseline, 3, 6, 9, 12 months, with mixed-methods data (surveys, tasks, interviews).
Include governance, ethics, and AI transparency considerations in scaffold design and evaluation.
Pre-register hypotheses and analysis plans; emphasize cross-domain generalizability and replicability.
